_doc: Durable hand-fix overlay applied by pipeline/phase3_build_pdf.py at build time. Survives regeneration. See polish/README.md.
_text_fixes_help: Applied to all prose. 'find'/'replace' are literal unless 'regex':true (Python re; backrefs like \1). scope 'all' (default) or 'page:NNN'.
_table_overrides_help: Key by SOURCE page 'pNNNN' (all tables on that page) or 'pNNNN:INDEX' (0-based table index on that page). Options: landscape(bool), font_pt(int).
